description_long: This bungalow features a prominent gable roof with large, overlapping gray shingles and a mix of stone and light-colored siding on the exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden posts and a paved entryway, while the side yard is enclosed by a light wooden fence and landscaped with shrubs. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the structure, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a carport or garage area, and a rear patio with additional outdoor space. Architectural details such as stone accents, wooden railings, and a mix of horizontal and vertical siding add visual interest. The overall design is spacious, with a clear separation between living areas and outdoor amenities, making it suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A spacious bungalow with a gable roof, stone and light siding, covered porch, fenced yard, and multiple windows. Features include a paved driveway, carport, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, paved entry, and landscaped garden along the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the gable roof, carport/garage area, and the fenced perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, grouped windows, and the continuation of the fence and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, garage door, and additional porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all sides
